chapter_title.en: The meaning of the saying of the Prophet, Allah’s blessings be upon him and his Family: «Whoever I am his Leader, then Ali is his Leader»

parts.text: حدثنا محمد بن عمر الحافظ الجعابي، قال

text: : حدثني جعفر بن محمد الحسني، قال: حدثنا محمد بن علي بن خلف، قال: حدثنا سهل بن [إسماعيل بن] عامر، قال: حدثنا زافر بن سليمان، عن شريك، عن أبي إسحاق، قال: قلت لعلي بن الحسين عليهما السلام،: ما معنى قول النبي صلى الله عليه وآله: " من كنت مولاه فعلي مولاه "؟ قال: أخبرهم أنه الامام بعده.

en.basel-kadem:
1. We were told by Muhammed bin Umar, the Keeper, al-Ju’abi, that he said: I was told by Ja’far bin Muhammed al-Hasani, that he said: We were told by Muhammed bin Ali bin Khalaf, that he said: We were told by Sahl bin Isma’il bin ‘Amer, that he said: We were told by Zafir bin Sulayman, from Shareek, from Abu Ishaq, that he said: I said to Ali bin Hussain, peace be upon them both:
What is the meaning of the saying of the Prophet, Allah’s blessings be upon him and his Family: Whoever I am his Leader, then Ali is his Leader? He said: He informed them that he is the Imam after him.
